passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. Nos. 23-24) 'A + B' means that A is the father of B, 'A - B' means that A is the wife of B, 'A × B' means that A is the brother of B, 'A ÷ B' means that A is the mother of B and 'A = B' means that A is the sister of B. On the basis of this information.

Directions (Q. Nos. 25-29) Read the information carefully and answer the following questions. [SBI (PO) 2013] If 'A + B means A is the father of B. If 'A ×B' means A is the sister or B. If 'A $ B' means A is the wife of B. If 'A % B' means A is the mother of B. If 'A ÷ B' means A is the son of B.

Directions (Q. Nos. 20-22) Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below. 'P + Q' means that P is the son of Q, 'P - Q' means that P is the wife of Q, 'P ×Q' means that P is the brother of Q, 'P ÷ Q' means that P is the mother of Q and 'P = Q' means that P is the sister of Q.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: 'A + B' means that A is the father of B, 'A - B' means that A is the wife of B, 'A × B' means that A is the brother of B, and 'A ÷ B' means that A is the daughter of B. If 'S ÷ T × U + Z', which of the following is true?

choices.a: S is the daughter of Z
choices.b: Z is the aunt of S
choices.c: S is the aunt of Z

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If S - T + Z, then which of the following statements is true? (condition will be as same as Q. No. 38)

choices.a: S is the mother of Z
choices.b: Z is the wife of S
choices.c: S is the aunt of Z
choices.d: S is the sister of Z

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Then, what does 'X + Y + Z' mean?

choices.a: Z is the father of Y
choices.b: Y is the son of Y
choices.c: Z is the uncle of Y
choices.d: Z is the brother of Y

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If A + B - C is given, Which statement is true?

choices.a: C is the father of A
choices.b: C is the son of A
choices.c: C is the uncle of A
choices.d: C is the brother of A

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If A × B ÷ C given, which of the following statement is true?

choices.a: A is the brother of C
choices.b: A is the father of C
choices.c: A is the maternal uncle of C
choices.d: A is the nephew of C

choices.b: P is the father of R

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which among the following options is true, if the expression 'I + T % J × L ÷ K' is definitely true?

choices.a: L is the daughter of T
choices.b: K is the son-in-law of I
choices.c: I is the grandmother of L
choices.d: J is the brother of L

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which among the following expressions is true, if Y is the son of X is definitely false?

questions.body: What should come in place of the question mark, to establish that T is the sister-in-law of Q in the expression R % T × P ? Q + V
